examples.title: PAC Learning Framework
examples.description: PAC learning framework with epsilon and delta parameters
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PAC-Learning
INPUT: epsilon, delta, hypothesis space H
OUTPUT: hypothesis h
BEGIN
 1. Choose a hypothesis h from H
 2. Calculate error rate of h on training data
 3. If error rate <= epsilon, return h
 4. Else, repeat steps 1-3 until a satisfactory h is found
END
examples.explanation: PAC learning framework connects data amount, accuracy, and confidence

examples.title: VC Dimension Calculation
examples.description: Calculating VC dimension for a hypothesis class
examples.explanation: VC dimension measures expressive power of hypothesis class

examples.title: Sample Complexity Calculation
examples.description: Calculating sample complexity for a hypothesis class
examples.explanation: Sample complexity is minimum training examples needed to learn reliably
